name: Beet Pickled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 16 oz jar pickled beets or sweet pickles
recipeInstructions:
1 Drain the beets, reserving the liquid.
2 Cover and refrigerate the beets.
3 Pour the reserved beet liquid over the eggs in a sealable container.
4 Cover the container.
5 Refrigerate for 2-24 hours, turning the eggs occasionally if necessary to pickle evenly.
6 Remove the eggs from the liquid and drain.
7 To serve: Cut the eggs in half lengthwise. Serve with the reserved beets if desired.
8 Serves 6
